courses.title: 1 Students may apply credits earned in excess of 30 credit hours for a health sciences Certificate, or designated general education courses (BIOL 2020, MATH elective, PHYS elective), or ALHS electives from those listed in the institution’s catalog. It is important that the electives chosen are appropriate and add value toward the chosen career path. Electives should be chosen in consult with the academic advisor.
